hero.description: Lead Frontend Engineer with 6+ years building regulated digital products (insurance, savings). Owner of frontend architecture across 10 production apps within a Turborepo monorepo. Led a team of 4 engineers.

about.title: About
about.bio: Frontend engineering leader specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I design frontend architectures for complex, regulated platforms — from design systems and monorepo tooling to GDPR-compliant subscription flows serving multiple insurance providers. I lead teams with a focus on code quality, developer experience, and shipping reliable products.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of professional and personal projects I've worked on

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, interesting projects, or just having a chat about technology.
